prompt: How faithfully does graphviz2drawio handle clusters? Check test/directed/cluster.gv.txt and tell me what's off compared to what graphviz itself renders.
assertions: Produced both a graphviz reference PNG and a converted draw.io PNG of cluster.gv.txt (image files present in outputs)
Findings are based on visual comparison of rendered images, not solely on reading the generated XML or source code
Report names at least two specific, concrete visual differences or confirmed matches (e.g., cluster boxes, node placement, fill colors, labels)
Report gives an overall fidelity verdict for cluster handling
